question: Design a `Book` class that encapsulates attributes like `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (all strings). Include a constructor to initialize these attributes and a `displayInfo()` method to print all book details.

test_cases.expected:
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
Author: Douglas Adams
ISBN: 978-0345391803
---
Title: 1984
Author: George Orwell
ISBN: 978-0451524935

errors: The constructor parameters shadow the member variables, leading to the member variables being default-constructed (empty) and not initialized with the provided arguments. The assignments inside the constructor assign parameters to themselves.
